creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
exp-run flag as used by "Ports & Packages" product has the following tooltip. However, neither (+) nor (-) actions are available for users with editbugs or portmgr (bug 214384 comment 26).

  Can mean want/needs/passed/failed exp-run by portmgr:

  * Set (?) to request an exp-run
  * Set (+) means exp-run PASSED
  * Set (-) means exp-run FAILED (new failures, regressions)
